mapper.sql: SEQ, RESUME_NO, CPNY_ID, DEPTNO, CODE_NO, IS_DEFAULT, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP
mapper.select: SELECT T1.SEQ, T1.RESUME_NO, T1.CPNY_ID, T1.DEPTNO, T1.CODE_NO, T1.IS_DEFAULT, T1.ACTIVITY, T1.ORDERNO, T1.CREATE_DATE, T1.CREATED_BY, T1.CREATED_IP, T1.UPDATE_DATE, T1.UPDATED_BY, T1.UPDATED_IP, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(T1.CODE_NO, #{lang}) as BUSINESS_NAME, T2.ORG_NAME_LOCAL as DEPT_NAME FROM ORG_BUSINESS_RELATION T1 LEFT JOIN ORG_INFO T2 ON T1.DEPTNO = T2.DEPTNO WHERE T2.RESUME_NO = #{resumeNo} AND T1.DEPTNO = #{deptNo} AND T1.ACTIVITY = '1' ORDER BY T1.ORDERNO
SELECT , GET_GLOBAL_NAME(CODE_NO, #{lang}) as BUSINESS_NAME FROM ORG_BUSINESS_RELATION WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.update: UPDATE ORG_BUSINESS_RELATION SET CODE_NO = #{codeNo}, IS_DEFAULT = #{isDefault}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{updatedIp} WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
UPDATE ORG_BUSINESS_RELATION SET ACTIVITY = '0', UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
